TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kingbong go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 387.53 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 271.51 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 87.22 km¬≤), 5,168 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,617 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,002 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 97%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Kingbong go ays psgayun 5 ru 27 alang. 27 alang hani ga, Vukide , Tjaviljaul , Sapulju , Gadu , Pudun , Tjudjaas , Kinilukuljan , Djelunavunavuk , Djumulj , Tjukuvulj , Tjukuvulj-viri , Tudrivuan , Laliavan , Mananigay , Tjulitjulik , Paumeli , Viljauljaul , Kalatadrang , Kaaluan , Maljivel , Valjulu , Madaljalu , Tjuletevetevek , Maledep , Tjuluuai , Ngudra-drekai (śĖįŚĮĆÁ§ĺŚćÄRukayťÉ®ŤźĹ), Rulakes .
S.PHON: kiŇčő≤oŇč …£o mki s~…ēku taituŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na pajwan, rukaj ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u kiŇčő≤oŇč …£o ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, *uki*e , tja*iljaul , s~…ēapulju , …£a*u , pu*un , tju*jaas~…ē , kinilukuljan , *jeluna*una*uk , *jumulj , tjuku*ulj , tjuku*ulj-*iri , tu*ri*uan , lalia*an , manani…£aj , tjulitjulik , paumeli , *iljauljaul , kalata*raŇč , kaaluan , malji*el , *aljulu , ma*aljalu , tjulete*ete*ek , male*ep , tjuluuai , Ňču*ra-*rekai (****rukaj**), rulakes~…ē .
S.FORM: Kingbong go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 387.53 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 271.51 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 87.22 km¬≤), 5,168 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,617 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,002 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 97%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Kingbong go ays psgayun 5 ru 27 alang. 27 alang hani ga, Vukide , Tjaviljaul , Sapulju , Gadu , Pudun , Tjudjaas , Kinilukuljan , Djelunavunavuk , Djumulj , Tjukuvulj , Tjukuvulj-viri , Tudrivuan , Laliavan , Mananigay , Tjulitjulik , Paumeli , Viljauljaul , Kalatadrang , Kaaluan , Maljivel , Valjulu , Madaljalu , Tjuletevetevek , Maledep , Tjuluuai , Ngudra-drekai (śĖįŚĮĆÁ§ĺŚćÄRukayťÉ®ŤźĹ), Rulakes .
